name: Bar: hide UtilButtons when empty
description: Collapses the bar's util-buttons row when there are no enabled buttons.
author: rom4ik

patches.find:
property bool borderless: Config.options.bar.borderless
    implicitWidth: rowLayout.implicitWidth + rowLayout.spacing * 2
    implicitHeight: rowLayout.implicitHeight
patches.replace:
property bool borderless: Config.options.bar.borderless
    readonly property bool hasAnyButton: rowLayout.implicitWidth > 0
    visible: hasAnyButton
    implicitWidth: hasAnyButton ? rowLayout.implicitWidth + rowLayout.spacing * 2 : 0
    implicitHeight: rowLayout.implicitHeight
